content.reason: Fast, cheap, good at structured short content
content.prompt_template:
Generate a social media post outline with:
- Hook (under 60 chars)
- Body (150 words max)
- 5-10 hashtags
- CTA
- Image prompt for DALL-E
- Alt text for SEO

strategy.reason: Best at long-form reasoning, 200K context, strategy depth
strategy.prompt_template:

- Executive summary
- Target audience analysis
- Platform recommendations with scoring
- Monthly content calendar
- Budget allocation
- KPI targets and measurement framework
- Competitive analysis
- Risk mitigation
